quiz.question:
Black invades the second rank.

All of our pieces seem to be protected. 

Is there anything wrong with playing Nxe6 and forking Black's heavy pieces?

answers.text: Yes! Our king will get in danger.

feedback.text: That's right. After Nxe6 Black has this annoying move ...Qe5, threatening a checkmate on b2 which is pretty hard to stop! White will have to give up a lot of material.

distractors.text: No, it's safe. We'll win material.

feedback.text: After Nxg6, Black has ...Qe5! Essentially a double attack that threatens checkmate and our e6-knight.

distractors.text: It's not wrong, but not good either. Black will just trade the rooks with ...Rxd1+.

feedback.text:
...Rxd1+ would be a severe mistake by Black since that allows us to take control over the d-file after recapturing it! 

Black has a much more dangerous response.
